continuation_of: GFX-PKT-006C and GFX-PKT-006C-R1 (prior evidence manifests unchanged in substance; R1 carries an additive superseded_by_r2_evidence pointer)

environment.schemas_changed_scope: research/contracts/raw_market_data_manifest_v1.schema.json rel_path definition only (no $id/version change); the other six schemas unchanged

remediation_results.gated_publication_api: normalise.publish_observations is the single supported public entry; it requires timezone evidence then calls validate_request -> validate_response -> validate_request_response_match -> gate_for_normalisation(all bar epochs) before invoking the private _map_bid_ohlc mapper; the prior public normalise_bid_ohlc no longer exists
remediation_results.no_output_on_gate_failure: absent/INCONCLUSIVE/CONFLICT/source-mismatch/uncovered/invalid evidence raises before any record; a test runs each non-VERIFIED case with a prospective output dir and asserts the dir stays absent
remediation_results.private_mapper_boundary: _map_bid_ohlc is underscore-prefixed, not re-exported (hasattr(normalise,'normalise_bid_ohlc') is False), documented as requiring the completed gate
remediation_results.timezone_runtime: source/account type-checked before regex and bounded <=64; evidence_method/dst_behaviour non-empty <=256; each observation an exact object with integer non-bool clock/offset fields; server_clock - utc_clock == implied_offset enforced; each observed_at_utc within [covered_start, covered_end); fingerprint + VERIFIED/source/scope/bar-coverage gate retained; no hardcoded offset
remediation_results.manifest_path_schema: rel_path pattern now rejects absolute, backslash, empty-segment/double-slash, '.'/'..' and leading-dot segments while still accepting the generated raw and quarantine paths
remediation_results.runtime_manifest_validation: one strict validator runs before every manifest write (on staged files) and on every read; enforces exact field set, schema_version, state, identity, canonical timestamps, ACCEPTED->null reason / QUARANTINED->non-empty reason, safe root-relative paths tied to the expected object directory with exact basenames, and that stored request/response files exist (regular, in-root, non-symlink) with exact SHA-256 matching the manifest; any tamper/missing/extra/path-unsafe/mismatch fails closed and is never overwritten or treated as idempotent
remediation_results.concurrency_staging: each attempt uses a unique tempfile.mkdtemp staging dir, cleans only its own staging, preserves foreign staging; final dir never overwritten; a late winner appearing before promotion -> discard own staging, validate winner, return ALREADY_PRESENT on exact request+response match else quarantine; deterministic quarantine dir reused only on exact request/response/reason match else fail closed; no partial accepted dir on any exception
remediation_results.http_hardening: max_response_bytes must be a positive non-bool int; base URL userinfo rejected; status retrieval and body read wrapped so TimeoutError/OSError/URLError become a generic redacted TransportError; response always closed; one attempt, exact bytes/headers/timeout/byte-limit retained; token/body never in repr or exceptions

tests.gated_publication_matrix: VERIFIED publishes; missing/INCONCLUSIVE/CONFLICT/source-mismatch/uncovered all raise with no output; invalid response raises ContractError before records
tests.timezone: type error, overlength method, offset arithmetic mismatch, observation-outside-coverage all rejected
tests.manifest: tampered response file, extra field, ACCEPTED+reason, traversal/backslash/sibling path, checksum mismatch and identity mismatch all fail closed
tests.concurrency: foreign staging preserved byte-for-byte; two objects do not alias; late identical race -> ALREADY_PRESENT; late/pre-existing conflict -> quarantine with accepted unchanged
tests.http: invalid max-byte (0/-1/bool/str) rejected; URL userinfo rejected; getcode failure and read timeout -> redacted TransportError with response closed; token redaction
tests.frozen_fixture_note: synthetic_timezone_verified.json (observation outside coverage) is retained unchanged and now drives a negative coverage test; positive VERIFIED cases build evidence in-memory

expected_results: All eight R2 findings implemented and unit-tested
No real network egress; HTTP and race tests use fakes inside the egress guard
Existing research + market-data tests remain green; smoke deterministic, gated-API only
Only authorised files changed; no dependency/CI/Make/unrelated-schema change
All five CI jobs pass for C5 and C6 push + PR runs
actual_results: research foundation: OK; synthetic smoke: PASS via gated publish_observations; deterministic byte-for-byte across two runs
check_no_secrets: no findings; make governance-check OK; make research-check OK; make market-data-check OK
json.tool: tightened schema and R2 manifest valid JSON
git diff --check clean; only the 16 authorised files changed (orchestrator.py not needed; contracts.py unchanged in R2)
C5 CI: push 28061006418 + PR 28061009404 (head 0932bff) — governance/backend/frontend/research-foundation/market-data-foundation all success; C6 final runs recorded in PR comment + handoff
no_network_proof: all HTTP and race tests use injected fakes/mocks inside network_blocked(); socket.create_connection raises in-guard; NetworkAgentClient remains inert unless allow_network=True; no real socket/URL opener invoked
limitations: Synthetic-only: no external agent endpoint, real market data, NAS path or credentials were implemented or contacted.
Backend 'core' test relies on the GitHub backend CI job locally (no backend/.venv/PostgreSQL); unchanged from 006C.
head_commit/c5_commit point at C5 (0932bff); the C6 block is filled at the evidence-only C6 commit after C5 runs concluded success; C6 triggers further CI recorded in the PR comment/handoff.

The pre-existing synthetic_timezone_verified.json fixture is retained unchanged (frozen) and intentionally fails the new observation-coverage rule; it is used as a negative test, and positive VERIFIED evidence is built in-memory.
The 006C and R1 evidence manifests' historical command/result/status fields are unchanged; only an additive superseded_by_r2_evidence pointer was added to R1.
